attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WDCL.BK_CLAIM_DETAIL_ID_INT,
WDCL.REPORTED_PART_NUM,
WDCL.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
WDCL.MEMO_NUM,
WDCL.AR_TRANSACTION_DTM,
WDCL.GLOBAL_SALES_TAX_USD_AMT,
WDCL.GLOBAL_SALES_TAX_LOCAL_AMT,
WDCL.RU_DISTI_INV_TRX_ID_INT,
WDCL.SRC_RPTD_CURR_CONV_RT,
WDCL.RPTD_UNIT_REBATE_LOCAL_AMT,
WDCL.RPTD_EXTENDED_REBATE_LOCAL_AMT,
WDCL.ELIG_UNIT_REBATE_LOCAL_AMT,
WDCL.ELIG_EXTENDED_REBATE_LOCAL_AMT,
WDCL.VARIANCE_LIMIT_PERCENT,
WDCL.ELIG_VRNCE_UNIT_REBATE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
WDCL.SOURCE_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
WDCL.UPDATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER,
WDCL.CREATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER,
WDCL.DISTI_REPORTED_COMMENTS,
WDCL.CLAIM_DETAIL_STATUS_CD,
WDCL.CLAIM_DETAIL_CREATED_DTM,
WDCL.ELIGIBLE_UNIT_REBATE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.ELIG_EXTENDED_REBATE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RPTD_UNIT_REBATE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RPTD_EXTENDED_REBATE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.ELIGIBLE_QTY,
WDCL.DISTI_RPTD_ELIGIBLE_QTY,
WDCL.DISTI_RPTD_TRADE_IN_NUM,
WDCL.DISTRI_RPTD_DEBIT_MEMO_NUM,
WDCL.POS_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
WDCL.AR_TRANSACTION_ALLOCATED_AMT,
WDCL.RESELLER_VALIDATION_CD,
WDCL.BK_CLAIM_ID_INT,
WDCL.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
WDCL.DISTI_PROMOTION_NUM,
WDCL.DISTI_PROMOTION_REV_NUM_INT,
WDCL.DISTI_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
WDCL.PRODUCT_KEY,
WDCL.VALIDATED_PROMO_PRODUCT_KEY,
WDCL.CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
WDCL.UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
WDCL.REPORTED_END_USER_NAME,
WDCL.REPORTED_END_USER_COUNTRY_CD,
WDCL.REPORTED_END_USER_LINE_1_ADDR,
WDCL.REPORTED_END_USER_LINE_2_ADDR,
WDCL.REPORTED_END_USER_CITY_NAME,
WDCL.REPORTED_END_USER_STATE_NAME,
WDCL.REPORTED_END_USER_ZIP_CD,
WDCL.REPORTED_END_USER_PHONE_NUM,
WDCL.REPORTED_RESELLER_NAME,
WDCL.REPORTED_RESELLER_COUNTRY_CD,
WDCL.REPORTED_RESELLER_LINE_1_ADDR,
WDCL.REPORTED_RESELLER_LINE_2_ADDR,
WDCL.REPORTED_RESELLER_CITY_NAME,
WDCL.REPORTED_RESELLER_STATE_NAME,
WDCL.REPORTED_RESELLER_ZIP_CD,
WDCL.REPORTED_RESELLER_PHONE_NUM,
WDCL.RU_WPL_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
WDCL.RU_GPL_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
WDCL.RU_RPTD_WPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RU_WPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RU_EXTENDED_WPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RU_RPTD_GPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RU_GPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RU_EXTENDED_GPL_PRICE_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RU_TOTAL_REPORTED_QTY,
WDCL.RU_DISTRIBUTOR_PART_NUM,
WDCL.RU_RPTD_MARKET_TYPE_CD,
WDCL.RU_RPTD_DISTI_INVOICE_NUM,
WDCL.RU_RPTD_RESLLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUM,
WDCL.RU_RPTD_RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NUM,
WDCL.RU_RPTD_RESELLER_CERTIFIED_FLG,
WDCL.RU_RPTD_RESELLER_CRTFCTN_CD,
WDCL.RU_DISTI_RPTD_OLD_PRC_LCL_AMT,
WDCL.RU_DISTI_RPTD_NEW_PRC_LCL_AMT,
WDCL.RU_DISTI_RPTD_OLD_PRC_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RU_DISTI_RPTD_NEW_PRC_USD_AMT,
WDCL.RU_DISTI_RPTD_PRC_CHANGE_DT,
WDCL.CLAIM_REJECTION_REASON_CD,
WDCL.CLAIM_CORRECTION_ACTION_CD,
WDCL.SHORT_PAY_REASON_CD,
WDCL.LOG_SOURCE_FLG,
WDCL.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
WDCL.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WDCL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
WDCL.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WDCL.SUBMISSION_REFERENCE_ID_INT,
WDCL.SOURCE_DERIVED_PART_NUM,
 WDCL.SOURCE_REPORTED_SALE_DT,
WDCL.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,   /* ADDED AS PART OF March2014 Release */
WDCL.SAVE_FORCE_RSN_TXT,      /* ADDED AS PART OF March2014 Release */
WDCL.RPTD_POS_BE_ID_INT, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
WDCL.RPTD_POS_BE_GEO_ID_INT, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
WDCL.RPTD_PROMOTION_BE_ID_INT, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
WDCL.RPTD_PROMOTION_BE_GEO_ID_INT /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY14 */
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_DISTRIBUTOR_CLAIM_LINE WDCL
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_CLAIM_LINE NDCL
WHERE NDCL.BK_CLAIM_DETAIL_ID_INT=WDCL.BK_CLAIM_DETAIL_ID_INT
AND NDCL.BK_CLAIM_ID_INT=WDCL.BK_CLAIM_ID_INT)
